---
title: "Daniel Flores Orozco"
image: "images/Avatar3.png"

about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-flores-orozco-06645378/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/floresod
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LxuXcX8AAA
      target: _blank
    - text: '<i class="ai ai-researchgate fa-lg"></i>'
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Daniel-Flores-Orozco
    - text: '<i class="ai ai-orcid fa-lg"></i>'
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1824-9088
---

## Welcome to my personal website bio-bytes

I am a researcher and data analyst at the THRiVE Discovery Lab at the University of Manitoba, with a background in biosystems engineering and a strong interest in how data can be used to better understand the world around us.

I am particularly passionate about working with reliable data and turning it into meaningful insights. I also enjoy building interactive dashboards and tools that make complex information easier to explore, interpret, and communicate.
